query:
UPDATE categories SET displayOrder = CASE 
  WHEN slug = 'bubble-tea' THEN 1 
  WHEN slug = 'coffee' THEN 2 
  WHEN slug = 'food' THEN 3 
  WHEN slug = 'mochis' THEN 4 
  ELSE displayOrder 
END;
